item.title: Version 1.1.24
item.description: What’s New 1. Added role-based access control on Country and Operator Details pages, so users only see data based on their permissions. 2. Improved multiple network display in Deal Details. The app now shows the first 3 networks and a “+ X” count for additional networks. 3. Fixed discount value formatting in Deal Details. Percentage and IVC discounts no longer show currency symbols, while amount-based discounts show the correct currency.

item.title: Version 1.1.21
item.description: What’s New 1. Added role-based access control on Country and Operator Details pages, so users only see data based on their permissions. 2. Improved multiple network display in Deal Details. The app now shows the first 3 networks and a “+ X” count for additional networks. 3. Fixed discount value formatting in Deal Details. Percentage and IVC discounts no longer show currency symbols, while amount-based discounts show the correct currency.
